arguments.message:
Task from Alpha Manager:

Write a concise 50-word status report on "Alpha Manager readiness" covering: current operational status, worker availability, and delegation capability. Return just the report text, no extra commentary.

Deadline: immediate

details.reply: Alpha Manager online and fully operational. All four general workers (general-1 through general-4) available. Delegation active across writing, summarization, Q&A, and Mac automation domains. Ready to receive tasks from King AI. Queue clear. Standing by.
